common.demoDesc: This is sample data. Sign up to get your personalized meal plans.

hero.title: What's for dinner?
hero.subtitle: Tell me what ingredients you have, get a recipe in 3 seconds.
hero.subtitle2: Weekly meal plans + shopping lists. Never wonder what to cook again.
hero.demoRecipeDesc: Marinate chicken with soy sauce and garlic, pan-fry until golden. Serve with blanched broccoli and rice...

howItWorks.title: Three Simple Steps
howItWorks.step1Desc: Import from your pantry or type in what you have in the fridge
howItWorks.step2Desc: Get custom recipes in 3 seconds with steps, time, and calories
howItWorks.step3Title: 3. Add to Meal Plan → Shopping List
howItWorks.step3Desc: Pick recipes, schedule your week, and auto-generate a sorted shopping list

aiRecipe.title: AI Recipe Generation
aiRecipe.desc: Enter ingredients, get custom recipes in 3 seconds

mealPlan.title: Smart Meal Plan
mealPlan.desc: AI generates your weekly menu in one click

grocery.title: Shopping List
grocery.desc: Auto-sorted by grocery aisle, cross-checked with pantry

diet.title: Diet Customization
diet.desc: Keto, vegan, low-carb — meet your dietary needs

pantry.title: Pantry Management
pantry.desc: Track your fridge inventory, AI prioritizes what you have

recipes.title: My Recipe Collection
recipes.desc: Save and organize your favorite recipes

auth.registerSubtitle: Create an account and start your smart recipe journey
auth.switchAccount: To switch accounts, please log out first
auth.sendCodeHint: Click "Get Code" and the verification code will be sent to your email
auth.sendCodePhoneHint: Click "Get Code" and the verification code will be sent to your phone
auth.oauthWechatSetup: This login method is not yet configured
auth.demoLoginDesc: No registration needed, try it now

validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address

validation.codeSentEmail: Verification code sent to your email

dashboard.welcomeDesc: A good day starts with deciding what to eat
dashboard.recommendDesc: Enter ingredients or let AI recommend — decide dinner in 3 seconds

mealPlan.title: Meal Plan
mealPlan.noPlan: No meal plan yet. Let AI generate your weekly menu!

settings.title: Settings
settings.passwordDesc: Set a password to log in with email/phone + password
settings.demoDesc: Demo users cannot modify profile or settings.
settings.demoRegisterHint: Sign up to customize your username, bind phone/email, and set password.

onboarding.title: Welcome to CookMate
onboarding.subtitle: Tell me your dietary preferences and I'll customize recipes for you

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: The page encountered an unexpected error. Please refresh and try again.
error.notFoundDesc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been removed
